default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
https://github.com/hykyura/ZalithOne/releases/tag/26.0.1

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 更新：
- [GP#1112](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1112)：同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- [GP#1074](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1074)：更新模组时，使用并发检查更新情况 by 由风
- [GP#1078](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1078)：增加韩语选项 by 由风
- [GP#1080](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1080)：新增截图管理器，可查看/保存所有游戏内截图 by 由风，MovTery
- [GP#1095](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1095)：移除高性能开销的主题切换过渡动画，仅在深色模式切换时过渡 by MovTery
- [GP#1099](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1099)：重写关闭全屏实现以支持 SDK 35 by 由风，MovTery
- [GP#1103](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1103)：为 JNA 依赖项目添加解压任务描述 by MovTery


## 重构：
- [GP#1072](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1072)：在中国境外下载资源时，不启用中国境内的镜像源 by MovTery
- [GP#1083](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1083)，[GP#1107](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1107)：重构启动器主题，使其更贴近 [Material 3 Expressive](https://m3.material.io/blog/building-with-m3-expressive) 的设计标准 by MovTery


## 调整：
- [GP#1086](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1086)：内容管理器 全选/清除选择 仅对已过滤的结果生效 by MovTery
- [GP#1111](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1111)：可通过特定方式绕过账号检查 by MovTery


## 修复：
- [GP#1073](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1073)：部分设备无法正确关闭全屏，同时可能导致触摸位置异常的问题 by MovTery
- [GP#1077](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1077)：支持根据模组自身的加载器选择版本进行更新 by 由风
- [GP#1089](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1089)：游戏信息显示窗口可手动关闭 by MovTery
- [GP#1096](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1096)：适配 Android 14 的前台服务类型限制 by MovTery
- [GP#1106](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1106)：ChromeOS 全屏化应用时，顶栏被遮挡 by 由风
- [GP#1113](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1113)：不允许 OptiFine 等版本进入更新加载器页面 by MovTery
